cite_as: Behind the Watt, behindthewatt.com, CC BY 4.0

events.headline: Ohio clears its fifth behind-the-meter gas plant in New Albany — EdgeConneX PowerConneX joins the Williams fleet.
Williams STY approved with 36 conditions: 296 MW of turbines + 116 MW battery for Meta's campus.
Williams files Neo — 666 MW of simple-cycle turbines + 260 MW BESS. The largest Socrates tranche yet.
FERC orders six grid operators to fast-track large-load interconnection and report spare capacity within 30 days.
NAACP moves for a preliminary injunction to shut down xAI's Memphis turbines under the Clean Air Act.
Satellite (Vantor LG01, 0.3 m): equipment yard imaged; visible units exceed 15-unit permit footprint; active vapor plume.
Satellite (Vantor WV02, 0.3 m): ~35-40 major modules on site; four graded expansion pads consistent with 41-unit permit envelope.
